title: I will never forget ...
content:
Children's Playground

My first camping trip

I went camping with my family three years ago. There were so many animals at the campsite. My little brother was very frightened when he saw a wild pig. I was not worried because it was far away. Squirrels played hide-and-seek with me and I ran after them. When I was tired, I lay on the grass enjoying the sunshine. At night, I looked at the twinkling stars in the sky from my tent. That camping trip was an exciting experience!

Carol Wong, 11 years old

When I became nine years old

Best friends came to my home.
Ice cream and cake,
Red and blue balloons.
Together everyone sang 'Happy Birthday' to me.
How happy and surprised I felt!
Dad gave me a bicycle,
And Mum gave me a video game.
Years from now, I will never forget.

Pete Lo, 11 years old

My holiday at the beach

My family went to the beach last summer. There was so much rain every day! We had to stay indoors for almost the whole holiday. We had no games to play or places to visit. I was bored to death! Mum and Dad have decided not to spend our holiday at the beach again.

Megan Ng, 12 years old

My first day at school

My first day at primary school was disappointing. I was excited to start school, but I was frightened when I got there. I got lost and could not find my classroom. I sat by myself at lunch because I did not know anybody. On the following day, the monitor invited me to have lunch with him and other classmates. Very soon, we became good friends. I have to leave primary school this summer. I hope I can make some good friends at secondary school too.

Kevin Lau, 12 years old
